title: centaurea × aurigerana
intro: Centaurea × aurigerana, also known as the aurigeran, is a hybrid plant species within the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Centaurea × aurigerana include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and infections.
